free_text: NEUTRON ELASTIC SCATTERING CROSS SECTIONS FOR O-16
FAST NEUTRON TANDEM VAN DE GRAAFF
PULSED DEUTERON BEAM ON 2-ATM OF DEUTERIUM GAS.
WITH PHOTOMULTIPLIER USED AS MAIN NEUTRON DETECTOR
NEUTRON SOURCE REACTION USED TO NORMALIZE EXPERIMENTAL
METAL SAMPLE HAS SAME NUMBER OF BE NUCLEI AS BEO
SAMPLE. OXYGEN YIELD OBTAIN FROM DIFFERENCE BETWEEN
BOTH SAMPLES. CONSTANT FRACTION DISCRIMINATORS USED
TO MINIMIZE TIMING WALK. BOTH DETECTORS USED WIDE
MONTE CARLO SIMULATION USED TO CORRECT FOR ANISOTROPY
OF SOURCE REACTION, FINITE ANGULAR RESOLUTION, FINITE
DETECTOR SIZE, PRESENCE OF MULTIPLE ELEMENTS IN
SAMPLE, ATTENUATION IN SAMPLE, AND MULTIPLE SCATTER-
DATA TAKEN FROM PRIVATE COMM., PURSER, 79/6.
